entity_health_bars.description: Red HP bar over every hostile vessel — enemy galleons, ghost ships, and sea monsters. Lifted high (4 world-units) so the bar sits above the mast rather than inside the hull. Allies are off; the player's own ship has its dedicated ship_status panel.

pirate_voyage.description: Treasure-hunt match rules — host spawns floating loot, every captain claims gold by sailing through it. Wins on first to scoreToWin gold or highest plunder when round timer expires.

ocean_atmosphere.description: Ambient lighting + fog cycle for a 6-min in-game day. Optional storms desaturate the scene and shrink fog distance for rough-seas mood.
